Note.title: Note
Note.description: A generated note from a YouTube video.

userId.description: The ID of the user who generated the note.

videoUrl.description: The URL of the YouTube video.

videoTitle.description: The title of the YouTube video.

noteType.description: The type of note generated (e.g., Bullet Points, Textbook).

users/{userId}/notes/{noteId}.description: Notes generated by a specific user.
